title: lespedeza floribunda var. fasciculiflora
intro: Lespedeza floribunda var. fasciculiflora, also known as the Clustered Lespedeza or Purple Bush Clover, is a type of flowering plant in the legume family that is native to Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties, and has been used to treat various health conditions such as fever, sore throats, and skin irritations. The plant is rich in flavonoids and saponins, which are believed to have antioxidant and immunomodulatory effects, providing health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and enhancing immune function. Lespedeza floribunda var. fasciculiflora can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat a range of conditions.
